velocityTop.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.
velocityTop.descriptionZh: 一个开源的、自托管的 PaaS 替代品，适用于 Vercel、Heroku 和 Netlify，让你轻松在自己的服务器上部署静态网站、数据库、全栈应用和 280 多个一键服务。

velocityTop.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Microsoft SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.
velocityTop.descriptionZh: 自托管的数据库备份管理器，带有网页 UI。调度、备份和恢复 MySQL、PostgreSQL、MariaDB、Microsoft SQL Server、MongoDB、SQLite 和 Redis 到 S3、SFTP 或本地存储。支持 SSH 隧道。

velocityTop.description: Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.
velocityTop.descriptionZh: Leantime 是一个以目标为导向的项目管理系统，专为非项目经理设计，考虑了 ADHD、自闭症和阅读障碍。

velocityTop.description: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.
velocityTop.descriptionZh: SecLists 是安全测试者的伴侣。它是一个在安全评估中使用的多种类型列表的集合，集中在一个地方。列表类型包括用户名、密码、URL、敏感数据模式、模糊负载、Web Shell 等等。

starsTop.description: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.
